raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew me buhs Negantibu
11, tawa Namwa neſ/ ka tu ne toh-
25, pi iſveldehts / lihdſka winxi/ tew
buhs par teem reebtees / un tohs
wiﬀai negantus turreht / jo tee
irr par Isdeideſchann nodohti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta VIII. Nodalla.
Mahſischana/ ka Deewa Bauslus buhs turreht
1. Deewa Labdarrischanas/ ko wiꞥſch Ifra-
eſam 40 Gaddus parahdiſis : 2. Lahe Na
naäna Semmes Labbums : 6. Deewam par
to japateiz : 11. Teem Neſklauſigeem tohp
ta Sohdiba spreesta: 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Iſſus tohs Bauslus/ ko
es tew ſchodeen paweh-
tu / buhs tew turreht /
un tohs darriht / ka juhs dſihwo-
jat un wairotti tohpat / un nahkat
un eemantojat to Semmi/ ko tas
KUNG S juhſeim Tehweim
ſwehejs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs atgahdatees
wiﬀu to Zelfu / pa kurru tas
KUNG S taws Deevs tew
ſchtunis tſchetrdesmits Gaddês
Tuſſneſi irr waddis / ka wiꞥſch
tew mehrdetu/ un pahrbanditu/
ka wiꞥſch finnatu/ kas tawa Sir-
di irr / arrig tu winna Bauslus
buhtu turrejs/ jeb ne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch mehrdeja tew/ un
iſſe tew iſſalt / un ehdiſaja tew
ar Mann / ko tu ne pasinni/ nedſ
tawi Tehwi bij pasinnuſchi / ka
wiꞥſch tew Sinnu dohtu/ ka tas
Zilweks ne no Maises ween dſih-
wo/ bet ka Zilweks dſihwo no wiſ-
fa / kas no ta KUNG A Muttes
iſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tawas Drehbes ne irr ne
tawa Wirſu nodillufchas/ un ta-
wa Rahja ne irr ustuhkuſi ſchin-
nis tſchetrdemits Gaddos.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu atſihſti tawa Sir-
di/ ka tas KUNGStaws Deewe-
tew pahrmahza / ittin ka weene-
Wihrs Jawu Dehlu pahr-
mahza.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un turri ta KUNGA tawa
Deewa Bauslus / ſtaigadams ue-
wina Zetteem / un bihſtee-
winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNG S tawa
Deews eetwedd tew us labbi-
Semmi/ weenn Semmi/ kur Up-
pes / Akkas un Oſtumi eeſſcha-
irr/ kas Eelejaſ un Kalnôs teke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weenu Semmi eeſſch ka
Riveefcht / Meeschi un Wihna-
Rohſi/un Wihges-Rohſi/ un Gra-
natu-Rohſi irr / weenn Semmi-
eeſſch ka Etjes-Rohſi un Med-
dus irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weenn Semmi / kur tu-
Maisi bes Truhkuma ehdiſi / kur-
tew ne kahda Lecta truhks/ weenu-
Semmi / kur tee Akiniſi Dſelle-
irr/ no kurras Kalneemin tu War-
ru iſlausifi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu nu ehdiſi un pee-
ehdiſi/ tad buhs tew to KUNG-
tawu Deeton teikt / var to labbi-
Semmi / ko wiꞥſch tew de-
wis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sargajees / ka tu to-
KUNGII tawu Deewn ne ais-
mirtſi / ka tu ne buhtu turrejie-
winna Bauslus un winna Tee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
